name: ISharingLocation
summary: Represents a location used for sharing in the Tekla Structures model.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Gets the display name of the sharing location. It uses the current TS language when feasible.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the sharing location.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of the sharing location. It does not change based on the TS language.
